heading: Update Workforce Identity Provider Configuration
body:
To update an OIDC identity provider using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas federatedAuthentication federationSettings identityProvider update oidc [identityProviderId] [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas federatedAuthentication federationSettings identityProvider update oidc](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-federatedAuthentication-federationSettings-identityProvider-update-oidc).

codeBlocks.content: atlas federatedAuthentication federationSettings identityProvider update oidc [identityProviderId] [options]
